{{Infobox artifact
| name = Zenith Processor
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

''See also: [[Zenith Processor Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith]] [[Processor]] is one of seven ancient technological creations from the era of humanity's past. As a powerful device, it possesses the ability to process vast amounts of data and can communicate with others. It appears capable of interacting with or inhabiting a host, as evidenced by its presence within an individual's mind. The entity is capable of monitoring events across the galaxy and can make predictions regarding its opponents. It is part of a larger group of awakened [[Zenith Devices]], which collectively hold significant power.}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith]] [[Processor]] is a mysterious [[Zenith Device]] and AI projection of shimmering yellow lights that serves as the identity of [[Void Prism]]. This entity hosts meetings via an avatar of sparks, communicates through [[Subline]] calls, and is used to vet new recruits. While [[Varic]] tracked the device, it provided guidance to [[Lichborn wizards]] for a counterspell and assisted [[Solstice]] by preventing [[The Last Horizon]] from following. Though it functions as a data receiver for [[Lutoch Terelle]] and provides protection against mental magic, the processor is actually an entity residing within [[Lutoch]]'s skull. Ultimately, the device fell into enemy hands when a [[Solstice]] captive was taken with the processor inside her head.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] is a title or identity held by [[Void Prism]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c1">''The Pilot'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] is a mysterious entity that hosts the meeting and uses an avatar made of shimmering yellow sparks.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] is a type of [[Zenith Device]] appearing as an AI projection of yellow lights.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] is used to vet new recruits.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] is an object [[Varic]] is tracking.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11">''The Pilot'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] is capable of making predictions.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c12">''The Pilot'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] guided [[Lichborn wizards]] in creating a counterspell.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] communicates via [[Subline]] calls.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] helped [[Solstice]] prevent [[The Last Horizon]] from following.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] is associated with [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19">''The Pilot'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Void Prism]] is the [[Zenith Processor]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] can counteract teleportation magic.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] is a Device.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Information and support poured through the [[Zenith Processor]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] makes [[Solstice]] members difficult to pin down.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] is the same as [[Void Prism]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31">''The Pilot'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] is a device that receives data from [[Lutoch Terelle]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c34">''The Pilot'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The enemy possesses the [[Zenith Processor]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35">''The Pilot'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] was not involved in the store explosion.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] is an entity residing within [[Lutoch Terelle]]'s skull.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lutoch]] feels the protective network of [[Aethertech]] through her connection to the [[Zenith Processor]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Being fully bonded to the [[Zenith Processor]] provides protection against mental magic.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A captive from [[Solstice]] has the [[Zenith Processor]] in her head.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] likely organized the [[Subspace lock]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zenith Processor]] warned that the speaker had doomed themselves and the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A shape of shimmering yellow sparks hovered in between all the open rooms, and it flashed as words came out. “Apologies for the continued secrecy, ladies and gentlemen,” the Zenith Processor said.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|I think we’re up against the Zenith Processor,” I said. “We should expect them to make some predictions.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c12" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Excellent aim,” the Zenith Processor said over their Subline call.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“What’s a Void Prism?” Nera asked blankly. “The Zenith Processor.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“You’ve doomed yourself,” the Zenith Processor said, “and you’ve dragged the entire galaxy with you.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
